description:
Yet another cross-platform graphical process/system monitor.


Another small release. This mostly fixes some docs, bumps some dependencies/the Rust version used to build things, and adds a bandaid to seemingly avoid causing Kitty to use extra CPU when cursor_trail is enabled (yeah that's a bit of a weird one).
Other
- #2114: Remove period in docs (thanks @dastarruer!)
- #2118: Use Rust 1.96.1.
- #2119: Workaround change for draw behaviour that caused Kitty with cursor_trail to occasionally use more CPU.
Full Changelog: 0.14.2...0.14.3
